allow: Bash(python -c "import ast, sys; files=['main.py','gdrive_sync.py','core/models.py','core/auth.py','core/api_pool.py']; errs=0; [print\(f'OK: {f}'\) or None if not \(lambda: [print\(f'SYNTAX ERROR in {f}: {e}'\), setattr\(sys.modules[__name__], 'errs', errs+1\)]\(\)\)[0] else None for f in files for src in [open\(f\).read\(\)] for _ in [ast.parse\(src\)] or [None]]")
